text:
Created attachment 147146
net/despoof [req maintainer] WWW (svn diff)

net/despoof

This comes more as a show of interest, and activity. Than anything else.

replaces WWW (current WWW has been dead for quite awhile)
adds MAINTAINER
reflows pkg-descr

I'm currently migrating it from net/libnet10 to net/libnet(11)
should be complete in next couple days.
Please see 2014-09-09.diff, attached.

Thank you for all your time, and consideration.

--Chris
